options.name: -absolute_cap_tolerance
options.description: Specifies the tolerance value for capacitance (as an absolute value) while comparing two report files

options.name: -absolute_tolerance_optimistic
options.description: This switch will specify the absolute tolerance limit for flagging an optimistic failure. An optimistic path violating absolute as well as percentage tolerance limit will be flagged as FAIL in compare_model_timing output report. Default value of this switch is 15ps.

options.name: -absolute_tolerance_pessimistic
options.description: This switch will specify the absolute tolerance limit for flagging a pessimistic failure. A pessimistic path violating absolute as well as percentage tolerance limit will be flagged as FAIL in compare_model_timing output report. Default value of this switch is 15ps.

options.name: -absolute_tran_tolerance
options.description: Specifies the tolerance value for transition time at ports (as an absolute value) while comparing two report files

options.name: -compare
options.description: Specifies the name of the report file that contains the interface timing characteristics extracted from the model created using the model extraction command

options.name: -ignore_view
options.description: Compares non-MMMC design write_model_timing output report with the MMMC design output report of write_model_timing command

options.name: -outFile
options.description: Specifies the name of the output file in which the comparison results will be generated

options.name: -percent_cap_tolerance
options.description: Specifies the tolerance value for capacitance (as a percentage) while comparing two report files

options.name: -percent_tolerance
options.description: Specifies the percentage tolerance value for comparing the timing data of two report files

options.name: -percent_tolerance_optimistic
options.description: This switch will specify the percentage tolerance limit for flagging an optimistic failure. An optimistic path violating percentage as well as absolute tolerance limit will be flagged as FAIL in compare_model_timing output report. Default value of this switch is 3%

options.name: -percent_tolerance_pessimistic
options.description: This switch will specify the percentage tolerance limit for flagging a pessimistic failure. A pessimistic path violating percentage as well as absolute tolerance limit will be flagged as FAIL in compare_model_timing output report. Default value of this switch is 3%

options.name: -percent_tran_tolerance
options.description: Specifies the tolerance value for transition time at ports (as a percentage) while comparing two report files

options.name: -ref
options.description: Specifies the name of the reference file that is used for comparison. This is the report file that was generated by using the write_model_timing command on the original design
